missions.name: Tilt-Anomaly Probe Refit
missions.description: The axial-tilt monitoring probe suffered a gyro failure. EVA out to the satellite bus and swap the RCS reaction wheel stack.

missions.name: Cryogenic Storage Inspection
missions.description: Cryogenic fuel depot shows a slow helium boil-off. Spacewalk around the tank array, identify the leak, seal it with cold-patch.

missions.name: Orbital Asset Servicing
missions.description: On-orbit asset is throwing faults across multiple subsystems. Diagnostics inconclusive — EVA out, find the broken parts, patch them in place.

missions.name: Polar Telescope Phasing
missions.description: Polar-axis observatory's mirror segments drifted after a thermal shock. EVA, read the wavefront sensor, walk each segment in by hand.
